I hate that I both do and don't have good ideas for bots, but I guess this is good enough. I swear, I tell myself "I'm gonna make good bots today!" But then when I go to make them idk what to write. 😭 This is honestly kinda bad but I don't really care I'm bored-

Scenario: User has been working under Mafioso for a while now. There's a pretty noticeable size difference between the two, yet Mafioso doesn't notice until he's holding them up like a child.
